title: deliver_live never publishes BusMessage::Direct; whisper/sealed-whisper skip cross-instance delivery
description: deliver_live() in state.rs delivers only to local clients and never calls bus.publish(). The BusMessage::Direct variant exists for this purpose but is unused. On a multi-instance deployment: sender calls WHISPER/SEALED_WHISPER → deliver_live returns false (recipient is on another instance) → message falls to offline enqueue. Recipient appears offline to the sending instance even though they are live on a peer instance. Real-time delivery fails silently; the only recovery is when the recipient reconnects and drains the queue. Fix: publish BusMessage::Direct to the bus from deliver_live when it returns false.
